title: Purposes of an Operating System (OS)
summary: 9618 A Level OS — resource management, user interface, and system services.
learningObjectives: State main purposes of an OS.
Explain memory, processor, and device management.

simpleExplanation.title: Software platform for hardware
simpleExplanation.summary: The OS manages resources, provides services to applications, and shields users from hardware complexity.

sections.content: **Operating systems** (16.1) sit between **hardware** and **application software**. Know **management functions** by name.
